headline: Winners And Losers Of Q4: Coterra Energy (NYSE:CTRA) Vs The Rest Of The Diversified Upstream E&P Stocks
summary: Looking back on diversified upstream e&p stocks’ Q4 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including Coterra Energy (NYSE:CTRA) and its peers.
